tender.description: Augmentation of water supply in Lakhi Ram Park, Dhruv Enclave and Vikas Vihar Colony by 200 mm dia. water line on Baba Vidyapati Marg from gali no 6 C-block Lakhi Ram Park to 100 ft road in Ward 40 AC-09 Kirari under EE(C)-20.
